node.text: James is interested in extreme sports, recently trying rope jumping from a height of 150 meters and surfing.

node.text: James won an online gaming tournament last week and found the experience exciting and motivating.

node.text: James enjoys reading, especially during cold winter days, but finds it exciting to do something different in the summer.

node.text: James bought air tickets to Toronto and plans to visit Vancouver as well.

node.text: James plans to return from his trip on July 20 and intends to bring back a souvenir for John.

node.text: James recently started a course combining his passion for gaming and programming.
James has dogs that he taught to balance on a skateboard, and they enjoy playing with it.
James is currently working on a football simulator project, specifically on collecting player databases.
James is a Liverpool fan and follows all their matches closely.
James has previously played chess and acknowledges its strategic nature.
